tutorials.title: Tutorials
tutorials.subtitle: Quick walkthroughs of the main workflows you use every day.
tutorials.badge: Role-aware tips for admins and nutritionists

myDay.title: My Day
myDay.description: Review your own intake, workouts, water and assigned menu by date.
steps: Use the date arrows or picker to move across days; the refresh icon pulls the latest log.
Check the hero stats for calories eaten, burned, water and the menu name assigned for the day.
Scroll each meal card to see foods or exercises; tap an item to inspect its details and photos.
Compare intake vs goals with the carousel and macro cards to spot gaps quickly.

userProgress.title: User Progress
userProgress.description: Track your own weight and measurements with charts and filters.
steps: Select Add Entry to log a new check-in; include weight and optional measurements.
Use Refresh to sync the latest data, then pick a time range (14d–1y) to focus the charts.
Expand a measurement row to see its chart; the latest value shows beside the label.
Sort entries by date or weight to audit changes, and reopen entries to adjust if needed.

clientProgress.title: Client Progress
clientProgress.description: Review a selected client's tracked weight and measurements.
steps: Open a client from My Clients, then scroll to the Progress block to load their data.
Filter by time window and expand a measurement to browse its chart history.
Use Refresh to pull new check-ins if the client has recently updated their app.
Spot trends with the cards (current, start, average, min, change) before adjusting plans.

myUsers.title: My Clients
myUsers.description: Search, filter, assign, and open clients you manage.
steps: Search by name or email and filter by status; pagination controls the visible rows.
Use Refresh to sync assignments, or Assign User to link a user ID to you.
Click a client card/row to open their context (Profile, Journal, Meal Plans).
Unassign from the action menu when you no longer manage that user.

clientProfile.title: Client Profile
clientProfile.description: See core details and set the client's goal and target weight.
steps: Open a client from My Clients, then use Edit Goal to adjust target weight, units, and goal type.
Save changes to push updates; cancel to keep the previous target.
Review assigned date, status, and contact details in the details card.
Use the progress section below to validate if goals align with recent measurements.

clientJournal.title: Client Journal
clientJournal.description: View a client's day-by-day meals, exercises, and water.
steps: Pick a date from the calendar (or weekly view) to load that day's log.
Check macro cards and meal sections; photos show when the client attached one.
Review exercises and water totals to judge adherence for the selected day.
Use Next/Prev to move across days while keeping the same client context.

clientMealPlans.title: Client Meal Plans
clientMealPlans.description: See which menu is assigned to the client for a specific date.
steps: Choose a date with the picker to check the assigned plan for that day.
Each meal block lists the foods/recipes and macro summary for quick review.
If no plan shows, assign one from My Menus → Assign to client.
Use this view while adjusting goals to ensure plans match daily targets.

myMenus.title: My Menus
myMenus.description: Build templates, manage meals, and assign menus to clients.
steps: Start a new template with + New, name it, and pick a meal tab (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner/Snack).
Search foods or recipes (toggle Only recipes) and add items; adjust servings per meal entry.
Save the template, then expand it to edit, duplicate meals, or remove items as needed.
Assign a template to a client with date selection; expand a client row to see past assignments.
